title: UX Widget Troubleshooting Checklist
text: UX Widget Troubleshooting Checklist UX Widget Troubleshooting Checklist A) No widget found for <node_type>:<widget_name> Symptom: The browser debugger console shows a warning with the message: " Warning: ignored exceptions in initialCommand([{"instance":{"vsn":...), in details: Error: No widget found for <node_type><widget_name> ". There is an accompanying alert dialog with message No widget found for <node_type><widget_name> . Explanation: The message indicates that a widget class definition for this widget could not be found. This could be because of an invalid logical or physical widget definition. Cause 1: The logical widget definition is wrong, possibly due to any of the following: The DSP widget type property contains a typo. The DSP widget type is not defined in the [webwidgets] , [webentitywidgets] , or [webcomponentwidgets] section. The usysadm:usys.ini or usysadm:web.ini file has been changed but has not been loaded or reloaded by the UServer process. Resolution: Check whether the DSP widget type property matches with what is specified in the [webwidgets] , [webentitywidgets] , or [webcomponentwidgets] section in the usysadm:usys.ini file. Restart IDE to make sure the latest usysadm:usys.ini file is loaded. Compile or recompile your DSP component. Restart URouter to make sure all UServer processes use the latest usysadm:usys.ini file. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Cause 2: The physical widget definition is wrong, possibly due to any of the following: The widget definition in your [webwidgets] , [webentitywidgets] , or [webcomponentwidgets] section in usysadm:usys.ini does not map to a valid physical widget definition. The widget definition in the usysadm:web.ini file does not specify a widget class: If node_type is field, the widget_class property is missing. If node_type is occurrence, the occurrence_widget_class property is missing. If node_type is collection, the collection_widget_class property is missing. If node_type is component, the component_widget_class property is missing. The widget definition is not loaded or reloaded by the UServer process. Resolution: Check to see if the physical widget mapping in your [webwidgets] , [webentitywidgets] , or [webcomponentwidgets] section in the usysadm:usys.ini file maps to a valid physical widget definition in your usysadm:web.ini. Restart URouter to make sure all UServer processes use the latest usysadm:usys.ini. file. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. B) No constructor found for widget class <widget_class_name> for <node_type>:<widget_name>. Symptom: The browser debugger console shows a warning with the message: " Warning: ignored exceptions in initialCommand([{"instance":{"vsn":...), in details: Error: No constructor found for widget class <widget_class_name> for <node_type>:<widget_name> " . The message may also include additional text " Are you missing a Javascript include? ". Explanation: This implies that even though a widget type has been defined and a corresponding class name has been obtained, the framework either could not obtain the actual widget class constructor based on the definition or that an error occurred while the framework was creating the class constructor object. Cause 1: The class constructor could not be obtained because: The definition did not conform to the standard widget class definition specification. There was an error evaluating the class definition JavaScript code, this could be a script error. Resolution: Check whether the DSP widget type property matches with what is specified in the [webwidgets] , [webentitywidgets] , or [webcomponentwidgets] section in the usysadm:usys.ini file. Restart IDE to make sure the latest usysadm:usys.ini file is loaded. Compile or recompile your DSP component. Restart URouter to make sure all UServer processes use the latest usysadm:usys.ini file. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Cause 2: Creation of class constructor could fail because of a runtime error while executing the class constructor. Resolution: Verify that execution of the constructor does not throw any runtime errors. C) Widget class <widget_class_name> not found for node <node_id> Symptom: The browser page displays text message Widget class <widget_class_name> not found for node <node_id> and debugger console shows a warning with the message: "Warning: ignored exceptions in initialCommand([{"instance":{"vsn":...), in details: Error: Creation of custom widget <widget_class_name> failed" . Explanation: The physical widget definition is found in the usysadm:web.ini file, but the class specified by the widget_class setting cannot be found in the widget-class registry of the Uniface JS runtime. Cause 1: The widget class as specified in the usysadm:usys.ini file does not match the class as registered to the Uniface JS runtime in one of the loaded JS files. Resolution 1: Change the specification in the usysadm:web.ini file. Restart URouter to make sure all UServer processes use the latest usysadm:usys.ini file. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Resolution 2: Change the name under which the class is registered in your JS file.. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Cause 2: The JS file containing the code that registers your widget class with Uniface JS runtime is not provided. Resolution: Check whether you specified all JS files required to run your UX Widget Interface and make sure they are added to the specification in the usysadm:web.ini file. Restart URouter to make sure all UServer processes use the latest usysadm:usys.ini file. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Cause 3: The widget class did not properly register with the Uniface JS runtime class registry because of one or more JS exceptions. Resolution: Check for any JS exceptions that caused JS code execution to stop and fix the exceptions in your JS code. Perform a hard refresh of your DSP page in the browser. Related Links [webwidgets] The [webwidgets] section of the initialization file contains logical widget definitions for fields used in Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components. [webentitywidgets] The [webentitywidgets] section of the initialization file contains logical widget definitions for entities used in Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components. [webcomponentwidgets] The [webcomponentwidgets] section of the initialization file contains logical widget definitions for components used in Dynamic Server Page (DSP) components.
